title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for building long-running, stateless, event-driven AI agents. The tutorial shows how a coordinator agent uses multi-agent delegation to route tasks to specialized sub-agents while maintaining clean reasoning chains.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for building long-running, stateless, event-driven AI agents. It centers on a coordinator agent that uses multi-agent delegation to route tasks to specialized sub-agents. The key takeaway is an architecture that maintains clean reasoning chains while distributing work across agents, illustrating concrete patterns for agent orchestration and system design.
